issues.description: Main effect missing conditional action. Text states 'Your opponent cannot activate [Blocker]' during attack, but DSL only attaches DON. Requires second action with GiveKeyword or custom mechanic to prevent Blocker activation.

AttachDon action lacks required condition/duration link. Text implies DON attachment grants the Blocker-prevention effect for 'during this turn' when that card attacks—duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' or conditional on attack trigger.

Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is non-standard; should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' with subType filter, or clarify if leader can gain power. Text says 'Characters or [Silvers Rayleigh]' (implies character type only).

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Main] You may give 2 active DON!! cards to 1 of your [Silvers Rayleigh]: Your opponent cannot activate [Blocker] when the card given these DON!! cards attacks during this turn.
[Counter] Up to 1 of your Characters or [Silvers Rayleigh] gains +2000 power during this battle.
